violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Wall towards the back of the unit is not constructed of smooth, non-absorbent, easily cleanable material. Seal over any raw wood material and paper material to conform with code.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean stainless steel shelving.
Linen storage. — --Linen crate on the ground. Bring clean linen basket above ground at least 6 inches.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean floors, walls, ceilings. Needs mopping.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sanitizer bucket was not set up at the time of inspection.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not available or being used during operation.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device for fridge was not located.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --The mobile unit needs the walls and floors to get cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
